creator: phung8goahsohm7yooqu0gae@yahoo.com
text:
Some of the leading bytes get dropped in /usr/games/fortune

examples:

$ /usr/games/fortune
the best of my recollection, Senator, I can't recall. 

$ /usr/games/fortune
folks didn't come over on the Mayflower,
but they were there to meet the boat.

$  /usr/games/fortune
ds are the voice of the heart.
